title: ctenopsis patens
intro: Ctenopsis patens, also known as the climbing milkwort or hairy milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory infections, and also support the immune system. Ctenopsis patens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
